errors.not_in_voice_channel: You must join a voice channel first
errors.empty_queue: There are no songs in the queue
errors.permission_denied: This command can only be used by bot admins
errors.admin_only: This command can only be used by admins
errors.already_voted: You have already voted to skip
errors.duplicate_song: This song is already in the queue
errors.command_execution_error: An error occurred while executing the command: %v
errors.must_be_in_bot_channel: You must be in the same voice channel as the bot!

descriptions.playlist_confirm: Would you like to add the entire playlist (**%d** songs) to the queue?
descriptions.playlist_adding:
The first song will start playing.
The remaining %d songs are being added to the queue...
descriptions.playlist_skipped: %d songs could not be played and were skipped.
descriptions.paused: Playback paused and left the channel. Queue and playback position are preserved.
descriptions.repeat_all:
Queue repeat has been **enabled**.
When the current song ends, it will be re-added to the queue.
descriptions.repeat_single:
Single repeat has been **enabled**.
When the current song ends, it will play again.
descriptions.repeat_off_removed:
Queue repeat has been **disabled**.
%d duplicate songs have been removed from the queue.
descriptions.songs_removed: **%d** songs have been removed from the queue.
descriptions.search_prompt: Search results for `%s`. Select a song to play.
descriptions.system_status: Current system status of the bot

footers.playlist_confirm: React with ✅ to add all | Auto-cancel after 30s
footers.vote_reaction: You can also vote by reacting with %s | Vote expires in %ds

votes.stop_already_voted: You have already voted to stop.

play.description: Plays a song from a URL or search query.
play.example: play Never Gonna Give You Up

playnext.description: Adds a song to play next
playnext.example: playnext Never Gonna Give You Up

search.description: Searches for a song on YouTube
search.example: search Never Gonna Give You Up

pause.description: Pauses the current song and leaves the channel, saving state.

resume.description: Resumes playback or continues a paused song.

stop.description: Stops playback and clears the queue.

repeat.example: repeat, repeat on, repeat single, repeat off

remove.description: Removes a song from the queue

swap.description: Swaps two songs in the queue

skipto.description: Skips to a specific song in the queue

options.position: Position of the song to skip to

leave.description: Makes the bot leave the voice channel.

switchvc.description: Moves the bot to another voice channel

options.prefix: New prefix (leave empty to reset to !)

forceskip.description: Force skips the current song (admin only)

forceremove.description: Admin removes all songs by a specific user

forcestop.description: Force stops playback and clears the queue (admin only)

movetrack.description: Admin moves a song to a different position

options.from: Position of the song to move

status.description: Shows server and bot status (admin only)

voice.enter_voice_channel: Please join a voice channel first.
voice.enter_voice_or_specify: Please join a voice channel or specify one.
voice.join_failed_desc: An error occurred while joining the voice channel.
voice.leave_failed_desc: An error occurred while leaving the voice channel.
voice.switch_failed_channel: An error occurred while switching voice channels.
voice.switch_failed_queue: An error occurred while updating the queue.

admin.mention_target: Please mention the user whose songs you want to delete. (e.g., @user)
admin.no_songs_to_delete: There are no songs in the queue to delete.
admin.invalid_mention: Please enter a valid target (user mention). (e.g., @user)
admin.user_no_songs: **%s** has no songs in the queue.
admin.delete_complete_desc: Removed **%d** songs by **%s** from the queue.
admin.enter_positions: Please enter the source and target positions. (e.g., movetrack 3 1)
admin.enter_valid_range: Please enter a number between 1 and %d.
admin.same_position: Cannot move to the same position.
admin.cannot_move_playing: Cannot move the currently playing song.
admin.no_songs_desc: There are no songs in the queue.
admin.force_stop_desc: Playback was force stopped by an admin.

settings.sponsorblock_error: An error occurred while setting SponsorBlock: %v
settings.sponsorblock_what_desc: Automatically skips sponsors, ads, and other segments in YouTube videos.
settings.setting_apply_next: This setting will apply starting from the next song.
settings.showtrack_error: An error occurred while setting the notification: %v
settings.showtrack_what_desc: Displays a `Now Playing` message when a song starts playing.
settings.normalization_error: An error occurred while setting normalization: %v
settings.normalization_desc: Volume normalization has been set to **%s**.
settings.normalization_what_desc: Keeps the volume consistent across all songs so you don't need to adjust it for each song.
settings.current_prefix_desc:
Current prefix: **%s**

Usage: `/setprefix <new prefix>` or `%ssetprefix <new prefix>`
settings.prefix_too_long: The prefix must be 5 characters or less.
settings.prefix_error: An error occurred while setting the prefix: %v
settings.prefix_changed_desc: The prefix has been changed to **%s**.
settings.prefix_slash_note: Slash commands (`/play`) are not affected by prefix changes.

status.title: 💻 System Info
status.description: Current system status of the bot

music.enter_query: Please enter a song title or URL to play.
music.playlist_confirm_desc:
**[%s](%s)**

Would you like to add the entire playlist (**%d** songs) to the queue?
music.playlist_confirm_footer: React with ✅ to add all | Auto-cancel after 30s
music.video_unavailable_desc:
The selected video cannot be played, but a **playlist** containing this video was found!

Would you like to add the playlist songs to the queue?
(Unavailable songs will be automatically skipped)
music.video_unavailable_footer: React with ⬇️ to add playlist | Auto-cancel after 30s
music.video_with_playlist_duplicate:
**[%s](%s)**

This song is already in the queue.

However, a playlist containing this song was found!
Would you like to add the remaining songs from the playlist?
music.video_with_playlist_found:
**[%s](%s)**

A playlist containing this song was found!
Would you like to add the remaining songs from the playlist?
music.video_with_playlist_footer: React with ⬇️ to add remaining playlist songs | Auto-cancel after 30s
music.not_playing_or_loading: No song is currently playing or loading.
music.playback_start_error: An error occurred while starting playback.
music.live_ended_no_queue: This live stream has already ended and there are no more songs in the queue.
music.live_ended_skip:
**[%s](%s)**

This live stream has already ended. Playing the next song.
music.enter_voice_channel: Please join a voice channel first.
music.playback_ended_skip:
**%s** has been skipped.
All songs have finished playing. Leaving the voice channel.
music.force_skipped: **%s** has been force skipped by an admin.
music.force_skipped_ended:
**%s** has been force skipped by an admin.
All songs have finished playing. Leaving the voice channel.
music.stop_success_desc: Stopped playback and cleared the queue.
music.stop_already_voted: You have already voted to stop.
music.volume_out_of_range: Volume must be a number between 0 and 1000.
music.playlist_adding_all: Adding playlist songs to the queue...
music.playlist_adding_rest: Adding remaining playlist songs to the queue...
music.playlist_complete_desc:
**[%s](%s)**

The first song will start playing.
The remaining songs have been added to the queue.
music.playlist_skipped_count: %d songs could not be played and were skipped.
music.playlist_skipped_or_dup: %d songs were skipped due to being unavailable or duplicates.

queue.enter_position: Please enter the song number to remove. (e.g., remove 1, remove 1-5, remove all)
queue.no_user_songs: You have no songs in the queue.
queue.only_current_song: Only the currently playing song remains. Use the `skip` command.
queue.range_includes_current: The range includes the currently playing song. Start from #2 or use the `skip` command.
queue.no_user_songs_in_range: You have no songs in that range.
queue.enter_valid_range: Please enter a number between 1 and %d.
queue.cannot_remove_current: Cannot remove the currently playing song. Use the `skip` command.
queue.only_own_songs: You can only remove songs that you added.
queue.song_removed: **%s** has been removed from the queue.
queue.search_results_desc: Search results for `%s`. Select a song to play.
queue.only_requester: Only the user who ran this command can use this button.
queue.search_add_error: An error occurred while adding the selected song to the queue.
queue.search_timeout_desc: Search selection has timed out. Please search again.
queue.skipto_enter_position: Please enter the song number to skip to. (e.g., skipto 3)
queue.skipto_current: That is the currently playing song.
queue.swap_enter_positions: Please enter the two song positions to swap. (e.g., swap 1 3)
queue.cannot_swap_current: Cannot swap the currently playing song.
queue.only_own_swap: You can only swap songs that you added.
queue.swap_complete_desc:
**#%d**: %s
**#%d**: %s

These two songs have been swapped.

player.stream_reconnected_desc: Resuming playback from the same position.
player.stream_reconnecting_desc: Stream disconnected. Resuming playback from the same position.
player.stream_reconnect_failed_desc: Failed to reconnect. Skipping to the next song.

youtube.error_age_restricted: This content is age-restricted and cannot be played.
youtube.error_age_verification: Age verification is required for this content
youtube.error_private_or_deleted: This video is private or has been deleted

voice_handler.auto_pause_desc:
Voice channel **%s** is empty, so playback has been paused.

Rejoin the channel and use `/resume` to continue playback.
